name: @geist-nuxt/kit-api-docs
description: API docs kit. Distribution unit is the SLICE: when copying a component into a consuming project, copy every file listed in its `files` array (components -> app/components/, composables -> app/composables/). `coreDeps` are satisfied automatically by extending @geist-nuxt/core. Dependency rules: kit -> own files (declared in slice) and kit -> core only; kit -> kit is forbidden — shared logic moves up to core.

items.name: code-block
items.title: CodeBlock
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code block with copy button and soft-wrap toggle.

items.name: request-example
items.title: RequestExample
items.description: Multi-language request sample panel for API endpoint docs.

items.name: response-example
items.title: ResponseExample
items.description: Response payload panel (status variants) for API endpoint docs.

items.name: api-docs-section
items.title: ApiDocsSection
items.description: Full-width API docs assembly composing RequestExample and ResponseExample in a split layout.
